rules.name: ISO 14001:2015 Environmental Management
rules.description: International standard for environmental management systems

controls.name: Environmental Aspects Identification
controls.description: All environmental aspects must be identified and documented

controls.name: Legal Compliance Tracking
controls.description: Compliance with environmental laws must be tracked

controls.name: Waste Management Documentation
controls.description: All waste disposal activities must be documented

controls.name: Emissions Monitoring
controls.description: Emissions must be monitored and recorded

controls.name: Resource Consumption Tracking
controls.description: Energy and water consumption must be tracked

controls.name: Equipment Maintenance Schedule
controls.description: All equipment must follow maintenance schedule
